definition: A click- or tap-revealed, re-summonable hint. Unlike a Tooltip it has no persistent describing relationship with its trigger, so its content is announced through a live region rather than aria-describedby. Triggered by activation (not hover/focus), it is a separate concern from the tooltip.
usage: Cross-referenced by the Tooltip block as an explicitly-out-of-scope sibling; announced via the Live Region Status intent.
